requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851 安全及沙漠高温降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851 安全及沙漠高溫降額

summary.en: Djibouti does not appear to publish a mature, EVSE-specific national safety standard equivalent to a detailed charger code. In practice, project owners, utilities, lenders, and importers should use IEC 61851-1 for conductive EVSE safety and IEC 61851-23 for DC stations, supported by enclosure, temperature-rise, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, RCD, overcurrent, surge, emergency-stop, interlock, and installation evidence. Djibouti's extreme desert heat and outdoor dust exposure make thermal derating, ventilation, component temperature limits, and enclosure protection central acceptance items.
summary.zh: 吉布提似乎未公开发布成熟的 EVSE 专用国家安全标准或详细充电桩规范。实务上，项目业主、公用事业、贷款方和进口商应以 IEC 61851-1 作为传导式 EVSE 安全基线，以 IEC 61851-23 作为直流充电站基线，并配套外壳、温升、保护接地、绝缘监测、RCD、过流、浪涌、急停、互锁和安装证据。吉布提极端沙漠高温和户外粉尘暴露使热降额、通风、元器件温度限值和外壳防护成为核心验收项。
summary.zht: 吉布地似乎未公開發布成熟的 EVSE 專用國家安全標準或詳細充電樁規範。實務上，項目業主、公用事業、貸款方和進口商應以 IEC 61851-1 作為傳導式 EVSE 安全基線，以 IEC 61851-23 作為直流充電站基線，並配套外殼、溫升、保護接地、絕緣監測、RCD、過流、浪湧、急停、互鎖和安裝證據。吉布地極端沙漠高溫和戶外粉塵暴露使熱降額、通風、元器件溫度限值和外殼防護成為核心驗收項。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
Project owner / EDD installation and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by China domestic connector and communication standards. It is technically useful but China-specific: connector signalling, DC communication, local installation assumptions, and environmental validation may differ from IEC 61851 project evidence expected for Djibouti. China domestic thermal validation may not cover sustained outdoor operation in Djibouti's heat.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为 GB/T 18487.1-2023，并配套中国国内接口和通信标准。该标准具有技术参考价值，但带有中国特定性：接口信号、直流通信、本地安装假设和环境验证均可能不同于吉布提项目预期的 IEC 61851 证据。中国国内热验证也未必覆盖吉布提高温下的持续户外运行。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為 GB/T 18487.1-2023，並配套中國國內接口和通訊標準。該標準具有技術參考價值，但帶有中國特定性：接口信號、直流通訊、本地安裝假設和環境驗證均可能不同於吉布地項目預期的 IEC 61851 證據。中國國內熱驗證也未必覆蓋吉布地高溫下的持續戶外運行。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851 clause matrix, accredited safety reports, DC IEC 61851-23 evidence where applicable, IP and IK enclosure certificates, protective-device ratings, RCD/earth-fault evidence, surge protection data, installation instructions, and high-temperature derating records. For outdoor chargers, validate operation at the site ambient profile and document reduced output, fan/filter service intervals, and enclosure sealing. A GB/T 18487 report alone should not be presented as complete Djibouti safety evidence.
gap.zh: 应准备 IEC 61851 逐条矩阵、认可安全测试报告、适用时的直流 IEC 61851-23 证据、IP 和 IK 外壳证书、保护器件额定值、RCD/接地故障证据、浪涌保护数据、安装说明和高温降额记录。户外充电桩应按场址环境温度曲线验证运行，并记录降功率、风扇/滤网维护周期和外壳密封。单独 GB/T 18487 报告不应作为完整的吉布提安全证据提交。
gap.zht: 應準備 IEC 61851 逐條矩陣、認可安全測試報告、適用時的直流 IEC 61851-23 證據、IP 和 IK 外殼證書、保護器件額定值、RCD/接地故障證據、浪湧保護數據、安裝說明和高溫降額記錄。戶外充電樁應按場址環境溫度曲線驗證運行，並記錄降功率、風扇/濾網維護週期和外殼密封。單獨 GB/T 18487 報告不應作為完整的吉布地安全證據提交。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where IEC 61851 evidence is required by importer, owner, lender, EDD, or tender; national EVSE-specific mandatory publication was not confirmed, so weak/limited national standards coverage should be flagged honestly
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 acceptance evidence for Djibouti without a gap assessment and project approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 61851 safety evidence and high-temperature derating as the Djibouti-facing package. China GB/T 18487 evidence is a useful baseline, but it does not close connector, communication, installation, or desert-environment gaps by itself.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 IEC 61851 安全证据和高温降额作为面向吉布提的资料包。中国 GB/T 18487 证据是有用基线，但其本身不能弥合接口、通信、安装或沙漠环境差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 IEC 61851 安全證據和高溫降額作為面向吉布地的資料包。中國 GB/T 18487 證據是有用基線，但其本身不能彌合接口、通訊、安裝或沙漠環境差距。
